mechanical_correction.only_change: Raw pre-selection capacity is exactly/at most 52 security lines for exactly 50 companies; select one line per duplicated company before broad materialization.
mechanical_correction.raw_candidate_gate: Exactly 52 eligible security lines and exactly 50 normalized companies; more than 52 or any other company count is INPUT_BLOCKED.
mechanical_correction.class_selection: For each duplicated company, compare median raw close times volume across the latest 60 complete common Yahoo sessions. Higher median wins; exact median tie uses ascending ticker.
mechanical_correction.selection_evidence: Freeze raw 52-line identity, grouping, each Yahoo raw response URL/retrieved_at/SHA256, 60 common dates, liquidity medians, and final 50-line identity before broader price acquisition.

source_adapter.universe_route: Reuse the exact frozen V0.3 Yahoo topHoldings and Eastmoney m:105/m:106 f20 response bytes; no new universe request.
source_adapter.price_route: Pinned stock_kline_yahoo query2 chart interval=1d range=max raw response; Stooq raw-close cross-check only.

universe.company_ranking: Merge pinned Eastmoney m:105 and m:106 lines by explicit total market cap f20 descending with ascending ticker tie-break, accumulating exactly the first 50 normalized companies and all their candidate share classes present in the frozen responses.
universe.instrument_scope: US NASDAQ/NYSE stock markets m:105 and m:106 only; m:107 ETF/other excluded.
universe.known_bias: Execution-date current universe fixed backward through history.

prices.canonical_symbols: Exactly 50 selected stock lines plus SPY and XLG, maximum and exact count 52.
prices.primary_semantics: Yahoo raw OHLCV and adjusted close; current-retrieval retrospective adjustment, not PIT.
prices.crosscheck_gate: For every canonical symbol, at least 98% overlapping raw closes within 0.5%; no unresolved canonical symbol, no row fusion.

central_data.writer: quant_system.data.writer.append_rows with existing lock and DuckDB transaction
central_data.publication: Acquire and validate all 52 symbols in staging; isolated-copy append/replay-idempotency/conflict test; exact pre-write backup; then one bounded canonical publication, never symbol-by-symbol.
central_data.existing_rows: Append only missing conflict-free natural-key identities and prove exact replay idempotency.
central_data.postwrite: Receipt with exact symbol/date/row counts, duplicates, nonfinite values, coverage, source hashes, before/after DB identity and SHA256, WAL, openers.

strategy_after_central_ready.selection: Top10, hold through rank15, equal 10%, long-only, no leverage.
strategy_after_central_ready.benchmark: Same-date qualified current-Top50 equal weight; SPY/XLG diagnostic only.
strategy_after_central_ready.pass_gates: Base CAGR excess >1pp; Sharpe >= benchmark; MDD shortfall <=5pp; stress annualized excess >0; turnover <=200%; at least two positive relative subperiods among 2016-2019, 2020-2022, 2023-latest.

forbidden: fundamentals, industry, valuation, news, ML, optimizer, second strategy
